arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Leipzig's Sesko DECISION, Man Utd plot wonderkid RAID, Zubimendi LATEST
arts.sum: RB Leipzig director Marcel Schafer has insisted that Benjamin Sesko will not leave the club this month despite strong interest from the likes of Arsenal. Arsenal Transfer News Today: Leipzig's Sesko DECISION, Man Utd plot wonderkid RAID, Zubimendi LATEST

arts.ttl: West Ham progressing in talks for a new striker as they close in on RB Leipzig star in hunt for a forward
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 29-year old has not been prolific in Leipzig but West Ham are in desperate need of strengthening following injuries to Niclas Fullkrug, Michail Antonio and Jarrod Bowen.

arts.ttl: West Ham in ‘advanced talks’ over player – Loan deal with purchase clause being discussed
arts.sum: West Ham United are in ‘advanced talks’ with RB Leipzig over a deal for striker André Silva to join before the end of the transfer window. That’s according to journalist Philipp Hinze, who reports that West Ham are discussing a loan until the end of the season for the Portuguese striker. arts.ttl: Leverkusen star not ‘unsellable’ amid interest from England
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are aware of interest from clubs in England and Saudi Arabia for forward Victor Bonifance. Several Saudi sides are monitoring Boniface ahead of a potential bid before the transfer deadline. The Nigeria international is understood to be considered as an alternative to Liverpool’s Darwin Nunez, who is a transfer target for Al-Hilal.
